microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — translating technical risk into business-outcome framing for senior stakeholders.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows by running structured demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, directly saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating time-to-value for each team.

Ran 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, translating operational pain into a **prioritized roadmap** recommendation that influenced intent-based YAML generation as a core product feature.

Improved data retrieval and workflow efficiency by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% and enabling faster self-service access.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation-prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Conducted structured discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap identifying and automating the highest-impact process bottlenecks across the deployment workflow.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership clear visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of high-ROI infrastructure investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping all dependencies across 1,200+ warehouse stations before a single device was moved.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep the migration on schedule under tight operational constraints.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals through a structured CRM implementation — cutting proposal turnaround time and reducing lost deals from process gaps.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve qualified lead volume.

Conducted **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing recommendations that improved deal-level economics and gave leadership a repeatable model for future bids.

Used 'current/future state' and 'business outcome' language (JD: 'build current/future state process maps', 'translate technical capabilities into business outcomes') in microsoft_ft bullet 4, framing the sovereign-cloud work as translating technical risk into executive business framing.

Mirrored 'agentic orchestration / AI agent' vocabulary (JD: 'agentic patient orchestration platform') in microsoft_ft bullet 5 and skills section, surfacing Cyrus's hands-on AI agent build as directly analogous to Tennr's core product.

Embedded 'toil quantification' and 'proof of value' logic (JD: 'prove with evidence, not slides') in microsoft_2022 bullet 2 ('81 hours of manual toil per region') to show Cyrus's instinct for evidence-based business cases over generic demos.

Highlighted compliance/security fluency signal (JD: 'SOC 2, encryption, access management') in skills section as a named priority cluster, flagging readiness for vendor security assessments without resume inflation.
